mission.title: openfeature: Proposal to move `Provider Status` field from provider to SDK, refine semantics around ContextChange events
mission.description: Proposal to move `Provider Status` field from provider to SDK, refine semantics around ContextChange events. Requested by 5+ users.

steps.title: Check current openfeature deployment
steps.description:
Verify your openfeature version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n openfeature -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfeature
helm list -n openfeature 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working openfeature installation.

steps.title: Review openfeature configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant openfeature configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n openfeature -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfeature
kubectl get configmap -n openfeature -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=openfeature
```
Currently, provider authors are required to maintain a field indicating their [state](https://openfeature.dev/specification/types#provider-status): (`NOT_READY`/`READY`/`STALE`/`ERROR`).

steps.title: Apply the fix for Proposal to move `Provider Status` field from provider to…
steps.description:
In general looks good to me, thanks for this. Will have to see all the corner cases on providers implementation.

- According to [spec Requirement 2.4.5](https://github.com/open-feature/spec/blob/main/specification/sections/02-providers.md#requirement-245):

```yaml
Proposed simplification:
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n openfeature -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfeature
kubectl get events -n openfeature --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Proposal to move `Provider Status` field from provider to…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: In general looks good to me, thanks for this. Will have to see all the corner cases on providers implementation.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with openfeature installed or the issue environment reproducible.
